programme.desc: S1 , E510 : Lakshmi is married to Shriniwas Dalvi, who belongs to a traditional joint family. While she strives to navigate challenges, she supports her husband's dreams.

programme.title: Devmanus Madhla Adhyay
programme.desc: S1 , E349 : Ajit Kumar, a killer on the run, hides in Banaras as Gopal, a missing tailor. He hopes to escape his past, but secrets unravel as old shadows start to creep in.

programme.title: Veen Doghantali Hi Tutena
programme.desc: S1 , E308 : Samar, a wealthy tycoon, and Swanandi, a young middle-class professional, enter a marriage of convenience. However, their contractual nuptials gradually evolve into a profound connection.

programme.title: Lakshmi Nivas
programme.desc: S1 , E510 : Lakshmi is married to Shriniwas Dalvi, who belongs to a traditional joint family. While she strives to navigate challenges, she supports her husband's dreams.

programme.title: Tula Japnar Aahe
programme.desc: S1 , E429 : Ambika's death devastates Atharva and Veda. Her love for Veda brings her spirit back. She comforts and protects her daughter from beyond. Love transcends death.

programme.title: Patanjali Yog - By Yogrishi Swami Ramdev
programme.desc: S1 , E1462 : Baba Ramdev emphasises the importance of yoga and demonstrates various asanas and breathing exercises that enable one to lead a healthy and stress-free life.

programme.title: Eri Naam Bhalobasha
programme.desc: A police inspector gets married to his children's teacher. However, he gets murdered during a family trip. So, his wife hires his lookalike, a criminal, to set things right.

programme.title: Birodh
programme.desc: An inspector posted in a remote village area tries to fight against the corrupt local MLA. However, the MLA responds pettily by spreading lies about him.

programme.title: Nagin Kanya
programme.desc: Jeevan and Puja's lives change forever when they become victims of a bad curse. While Jeevan and his friend lose their lives, Puja takes the form of a snake.

programme.title: Pratisodh
programme.desc: Ranjan is sent to jail under false allegations by his uncle. However, he strives to take revenge and teach his uncle a lesson.

programme.title: Sundar Bou
programme.desc: Sabitri, who is married to Nanda, is exploited daily by her mother-in-law. Seeing this, her uncle decides to help her overcome her problems.

programme.title: Debibaran
programme.desc: Satyapriyo fights for justice when his sister is raped. During his fight, he takes on a corrupt village official in a twisted turn of events.

programme.title: Deewana
programme.desc: A newlywed Kajal gets widowed when her husband, Ravi, is killed by his enemies. She moves to another city and gets married to Raja, but her life takes a turn when Ravi returns from the dead.

programme.title: Pratibha
programme.desc: Pratibha and her husband separate for many years following their marriage. However, they eventually reunite after their daughter's husband begins working for his long-lost father-in-law.

programme.title: Sangharsha
programme.desc: In a village divided by corruption and power struggles between a politician and a doctor, honest newcomer Shubhankar challenges the status quo.

programme.title: Patanjali Yog by Yog Rishi Swami Ramdev
programme.desc: S9 , E581 : Renowned Indian spiritual leader Swami Ramdev delivers demonstrations of various yoga poses and exercises for a healthy life.

programme.title: Krrish 3
programme.desc: Krishna lives happily with his wife Priya and his father. However, their peaceful life is shattered when Kaal abducts Priya.

programme.title: Kanjoos Makhichoos
programme.desc: A man covertly saves money to fulfil his father's desire to go on the Char Dham Yatra. However, things change when his parents go missing due to heavy floods.

programme.title: Gunjan Saxena: The Kargil Girl
programme.desc: Despite her family's opposition, Gunjan Saxena becomes a pilot. She overcomes all hurdles and makes history as India's first female Air Force pilot to serve during the Kargil War.

programme.title: Mission Majnu
programme.desc: An undercover Indian spy takes on a deadly mission to expose a covert nuclear weapons program in the heart of Pakistan that could destroy the free world.

programme.title: Ghajini
programme.desc: Suffering from memory loss every 15 minutes, a heartbroken man uses photographs, notes and tattoos to keep reminding himself to punish his lady-love's murderer.

programme.title: Heropanti 2
programme.desc: A vigilante is sent on a mission by the government to kill enemy troops. However, things go wrong when he's mistaken for the leader of the troops.

programme.title: Ghayal Once Again
programme.desc: The lionhearted Ajay Mehra once again takes up the mantle of justice in a troubled society where the powerful believe they can get away with any crime.

programme.title: Iqbal
programme.desc: Iqbal, a speech and hearing impaired boy, wishes to play cricket for the Indian team, but his impairment overshadows his talent. Thus, he seeks help from a former cricket player to train him.

programme.title: Lootera
programme.desc: In 1953, Pakhi, an aristocrat's daughter, falls in love with an archaeologist. However, unbeknownst to her, he leads a double life that threatens their relationship.

programme.title: Berlin
programme.desc: In 1993 New Delhi, a deaf-mute suspected spy is arrested before the Russian president's visit. A sign language interpreter unravels a mystery that blurs guilt and innocence.

programme.title: Ek Khiladi Ek Haseena
programme.desc: Arjun and Rohit, two friends, professionally dupe people out of their money. However, when they steal a large sum from a dangerous gangster, their lives take a deadly turn.

programme.title: Mission Raniganj: The Great Bharat Rescue
programme.desc: Mission Raniganj - 2023 - Mining engineer Jaswant Singh Gill leads a challenging rescue mission to save 65 miners trapped in a flooded coal mine.
